name: Same Tree
description: Given the roots of two binary trees p and q, check if they are the same or not. Two binary trees are the same if they are structurally identical and the nodes have the same value.
constraints: The number of nodes in both trees is in the range [0, 100]. -10^4 <= Node.val <= 10^4.

performance.stress_intent: exercise full-tree equality checks and early mismatches; constraints are too small for tighter separation than repeated rescans
